title: FLUX.2 Klein Integration into SAM3 Server

stories.title: Install diffusers and FLUX.2 dependencies
acceptanceCriteria: python -c 'from diffusers import FluxPipeline; print("OK")' succeeds

stories.title: Download FLUX.2 Klein 4B checkpoint
acceptanceCriteria: Pipeline can be instantiated without download

stories.title: Create model_flux.py and add endpoints to main.py
Server starts and endpoints work via external URL
acceptanceCriteria: curl to /health returns models: [SAM3, SAM3D, FLUX]
External URL test returns 200 for all endpoints
